general.name: Restrictions Allow Airdrop Erase Install & Write Access to USB
general.description: Allow Airdrop + Allow Erase and Install + Write Access to USB
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>147EC41B-01E8-41CC-BAC2-7FD118D2B3B3</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>147EC41B-01E8-41CC-BAC2-7FD118D2B3B3</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions Allow Airdrop Erase Install & Write Access to USB</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Allow Airdrop + Allow Erase and Install + Write Access to USB</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>D465A4CB-04B7-450D-AC4B-709823D0AC1F</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>D465A4CB-04B7-450D-AC4B-709823D0AC1F</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>safariAllowAutoFill</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>0612711D-CB3B-4657-8C8F-DA1AD8ECC64D</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess.new</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>0612711D-CB3B-4657-8C8F-DA1AD8ECC64D</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Application Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>familyControlsEnabled</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C50B4A1B-60EF-4CB8-BFD9-5E28E6C4385D</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.coremediaio.support</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C50B4A1B-60EF-4CB8-BFD9-5E28E6C4385D</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CoreMediaIO Allowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C9DAA4A8-DF3D-4B15-9260-83664074E2D2</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.DiscRecording</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C9DAA4A8-DF3D-4B15-9260-83664074E2D2</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Disc Recording</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>BurnSupport</key><string>on</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>B03D2203-CCEF-4E70-9FA4-F97380104665</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.appstore</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>B03D2203-CCEF-4E70-9FA4-F97380104665</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>App Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>whiteListEnabled</key><false/><key>WhiteList</key><array/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>FFC9B9FD-1C44-44D8-AE86-877EAD1FEEBB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.finder</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>FFC9B9FD-1C44-44D8-AE86-877EAD1FEEBB</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Finder Settings</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>ProhibitBurn</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>127C7DAE-5F89-4686-AF63-4C7B7C3B579A</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.gamed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>127C7DAE-5F89-4686-AF63-4C7B7C3B579A</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Game Center</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>GKFeatureGameCenterAllowed</key><false/><key>GKFeatureAccountModificationAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureAddingGameCenterFriendsAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureMultiplayerGamingAllowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>76E195A8-318A-42CD-AFA7-C3C12FA3C0BB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>76E195A8-318A-42CD-AFA7-C3C12FA3C0BB</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowCloudDocumentSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments</key><false/><key>allowSpotlightInternetResults</key><true/><key>allowMusicService</key><true/><key>allowCloudKeychainSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudBTMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudFMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudBookmarks</key><true/><key>allowCloudMail</key><true/><key>allowCloudCalendar</key><true/><key>allowCloudReminders</key><true/><key>allowCloudAddressBook</key><true/><key>allowCloudNotes</key><true/><key>allowPasswordSharing</key><true/><key>allowPasswordAutoFill</key><true/><key>allowPasswordProximityRequests</key><true/><key>allowCamera</key><true/><key>allowContentCaching</key><true/><key>allowCloudPrivateRelay</key><true/><key>allowUniversalControl</key><true/><key>allowAirDrop</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseInstallation</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseRemoval</key><true/><key>allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation</key><true/><key>allowUSBRestrictedMode</key><true/><key>allowCloudFreeform</key><true/><key>allowLocalUserCreation</key><true/><key>allowStartupDiskModification</key><true/><key>allowTimeMachineBackup</key><true/><key>allowARDRemoteManagementModification</key><true/><key>allowBluetoothSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowFileSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowInternetSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowPrinterSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowRemoteAppleEventsModification</key><true/><key>allowAccountModification</key><true/><key>allowDeviceNameModification</key><true/><key>allowAssistant</key><true/><key>allowFingerprintModification</key><true/><key>allowCloudPhotoLibrary</key><true/><key>allowGenmoji</key><false/><key>allowImagePlayground</key><false/><key>allowiPhoneMirroring</key><false/><key>allowWritingTools</key><false/><key>forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert</key><false/><key>allowMailSummary</key><false/><key>allowMediaSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrations</key><false/><key>allowNotesTranscriptionSummary</key><false/><key>allowAppleIntelligenceReport</key><false/><key>allowMailSmartReplies</key><false/><key>allowSafariSummary</key><false/><key>allowNotesTranscription</key><false/><key>allowSafariHistoryClearing</key><true/><key>allowSafariPrivateBrowsing</key><true/><key>forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>allowAirPrint</key><true/><key>forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement</key><false/><key>allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery</key><true/><key>allowScreenShot</key><true/><key>allowRemoteScreenObservation</key><true/><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservation</key><false/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowFingerprintForUnlock</key><true/><key>enforcedFingerprintTimeout</key><integer>172800</integer><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock</key><false/><key>forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses</key><false/><key>forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses</key><false/><key>allowActivityContinuation</key><true/><key>allowDeprecatedWebKitTLS</key><false/><key>allowEraseContentAndSettings</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>AE3FADF8-1AC8-47E3-91B2-824D1C635391</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systempreferences</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>AE3FADF8-1AC8-47E3-91B2-824D1C635391</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisabledPreferencePanes</key><array><string>com.apple.preferences.appstore</string><string>com.apple.preference.digihub.discs</string><string>com.apple.ClassroomSettings</string><string>com.apple.preferences.FamilySharingPrefPane</string><string>com.apple.prefpanel.fibrechannel</string><string>com.apple.preference.ink</string><string>com.apple.preference.internet</string><string>com.apple.preferences.parentalcontrols</string><string>com.apple.Xsan</string></array></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>886EA52B-427A-40FA-908B-4567DBF1787B</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.preferences.users</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>886EA52B-427A-40FA-908B-4567DBF1787B</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>User Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisableUsingiCloudPassword</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>80FD3B10-147A-4EC7-9227-26E446AEEACE</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systemuiserver</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>80FD3B10-147A-4EC7-9227-26E446AEEACE</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>logout-eject</key><dict/><key>mount-controls</key><dict><key>cd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-internal</key><array/><key>disk-image</key><array/><key>dvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>blankdvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-external</key><array/><key>blankcd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>dvdram</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>E9698016-6A8C-4D3E-8F8C-9FF171B5C2EB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.desktop</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>E9698016-6A8C-4D3E-8F8C-9FF171B5C2EB</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Desktop</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>override-picture-path</key><string>/Users/Shared/Saks.jpg</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>125645C9-467E-4A45-BEC7-FBA0854F9680</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.fileproviderd</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>125645C9-467E-4A45-BEC7-FBA0854F9680</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>FileProvider</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowManagedFileProvidersToRequestAttribution</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>6264E844-6C54-41B0-9B07-3DF2D1503E88</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ShareKitHelper</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>6264E844-6C54-41B0-9B07-3DF2D1503E88</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>SHKAllowedShareServices</key><array><string>com.apple.share.AirDrop</string><string>com.apple.reminders.RemindersShareExtension</string><string>com.apple.Notes.SharingExtension</string><string>com.apple.share.Messages</string></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
